etymology.description: Depicts a filled container -> original form of 賜(賜) (cì, "bestow") -> borrowed phonetically for "easy"
etymology.interpretation: The character 易(yì) depicts a filled container, symbolizing an act of bestowing, as seen in the original meaning of 賜(賜) (cì, "bestow"). Over time, it was borrowed for the phonetic element to mean "easy," as the idea of a full or overflowing container could imply abundance or lack of difficulty.

examples.chinese: 学习新的语言并不容易(學習新的語言並不容易)。
examples.pinyin: Xuéxí xīn de yǔyán bìng bù róngyì.
examples.english: Learning a new language is not easy.

examples.chinese: 这个市场可以交换商品(這個市場可以交換商品)。
examples.english: This market allows for the exchange of goods.

examples.chinese: 解决这个问题并不容易(解決這個問題並不容易)，我们需要团队合作(我們需要團隊合作)。
examples.pinyin: Jiějué zhège wèntí bìng bù róngyì, wǒmen xūyào tuánduì hézuò.
examples.english: Solving this problem is not easy; we need team collaboration.
